api_examples.name: Send Simple Notification
api_examples.description: Send a stateless notification directly to one or more Apprise URLs
api_examples.curl_command: curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/notify -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"title": "System Alert", "body": "This is a test notification", "type": "info", "urls": ["discord://webhook_id/webhook_token"]}'

api_examples.name: Add a Persistent Configuration
api_examples.description: Save one or more notification URLs under a configuration key

api_examples.name: Send to a Persistent Configuration
api_examples.description: Send a notification through a saved configuration key
api_examples.curl_command: curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/notify/alerts -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"title": "Critical Alert", "body": "Server down", "type": "failure"}'

api_examples.name: List URLs in a Configuration
api_examples.description: Return the URLs and tags associated with a configuration key while masking secrets

api_examples.name: Get a Persistent Configuration
api_examples.description: Return the saved Apprise configuration associated with a key

api_examples.name: Delete a Persistent Configuration
api_examples.description: Delete the configuration associated with a key

api_examples.name: Check API Status
api_examples.description: Check API health and persistent-storage permissions

discord.setup: Create webhook in Discord server settings > Webhooks, copy ID and token

telegram.setup:
1. Talk to @BotFather on Telegram to create bot (get token)
2. Send message to @userinfobot to get your chat ID

slack.setup: Create Slack webhook from workspace settings

email_gmail.setup: Enable 2-Step Verification and create a Google App Password

email_outlook.description: Send through Microsoft 365 using Microsoft Graph
email_outlook.setup: Register an application in Microsoft Entra ID and grant the required Microsoft Graph mail permission

webhook.setup: Any service that accepts HTTP POST with JSON payload

workflow_examples.name: System Monitoring Alert
workflow_examples.description: Send alert when disk is full
steps: Add key: curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/add/disk-alerts -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"urls": ["discord://webhook/token"]}'
From cron: curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/notify/disk-alerts -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"title": "Disk Alert", "body": "95% full", "type": "failure"}'

workflow_examples.name: Backup Notifications
steps: Set up a configuration key for the backup team
After the backup completes, send a success notification to that key
If the backup fails, send a failure notification to that key

workflow_examples.name: Multi-Channel Notifications
workflow_examples.description: Send same message to multiple platforms
steps: Add multiple URLs to the same configuration key
Send once to the key to reach all configured platforms
